title: dendranthema lavandulifolium var. tomentellum
intro: Dendranthema lavandulifolium var. tomentellum, also known as the woolly chrysanthemum, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dendranthema lavandulifolium var. tomentellum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
